name.ja: <ruby>召<rt>しょう</rt></ruby><ruby>喚<rt>かん</rt></ruby><ruby>獣<rt>じゅう</rt></ruby>ディー・アニマ

text.en:
1 "Aleister" monster + 1 monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck
If this card is Special Summoned: You can activate 1 of these effects;
● Destroy all monsters your opponent controls that were Special Summoned from the Extra Deck.
● Destroy all Spells/Traps your opponent controls.
When your opponent activates a card effect in the GY (Quick Effect): You can banish this card; Special Summon 1 "Aleister" monster from your Deck, and if you do, negate that effect. You can only use each effect of "Invoked Dee Anima" once per turn.

materials: 1 "Aleister" monster + 1 monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck
